overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game, walking through neon-lit urban streets at night. The journey transitions from commercial districts through narrow alleys to an open courtyard with a fire pit, then through dark underpasses to a foggy open street. The visuals feature high-quality cinematic lighting with vibrant neon colors and atmospheric fog effects.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide commercial street at night, dominated by vibrant neon signs and digital billboards. The camera moves forward through the wet streets, passing a building with prominent red PRE signage on the right and a modern glass office building on the left. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with purple and cyan neon reflections on the wet pavement.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed alleyway with brick walls on both sides. The ground is littered with trash and debris. The camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead through the confined space, passing a yellow vending machine and digital poster stands. The large digital billboard from the previous street remains visible in the distance to the left.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a large industrial courtyard featuring a prominent burning fire pit that casts warm orange light on the surroundings. Groups of people are seated at tables around the fire. The space is enclosed by tall rusty industrial walls with an overhead catwalk. The camera explores the area before descending a staircase with orange railings at the far end.

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions into a dark industrial underpass characterized by large concrete pillars and dim lighting. The camera moves forward through the enclosed corridor toward a distant bright exit light. A pedestrian is visible walking in the opposite direction. The environment is gritty and industrial, with a lit vending machine visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban street with street lamps and billboards

segments.scene_description: The final segment emerges from the underpass into an open foggy street illuminated by street lamps. The atmosphere is hazy with thick fog obscuring the background. The camera passes a pedestrian with an umbrella and approaches a blue vehicle parked on the right. Large digital billboards are visible through the mist, and metal railings line the left side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district into a gritty industrial courtyard. It begins on a wide street at night, gliding over wet pavement reflecting purple and cyan lights while passing digital billboards and a glass office building. As the camera moves forward, the open street narrows into a confined brick alleyway littered with debris, following a pedestrian past a yellow vending machine. The scene then opens into a large industrial courtyard where the cool neon tones are replaced by the warm orange glow of a central burning fire pit. The camera explores this enclosed space of rusty walls and seated crowds before finally descending a staircase with orange railings at the far end.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into a wide, fog-shrouded urban street. It begins by moving through a dark concrete corridor flanked by massive pillars and a glowing vending machine, heading toward a distant point of light while passing a lone pedestrian. As the camera reaches the exit, the enclosed space opens up into a hazy outdoor environment illuminated by the soft glow of street lamps. The scene then shifts into a thick mist where the camera passes a person with an umbrella and a parked blue vehicle, while large digital billboards loom faintly through the fog. Finally, the movement continues along the street, guided by metal railings on the left as the background remains obscured by the atmospheric haze.
